mapper.sql: select c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.phone, c.sex, c.source, c.level, c.industry, c.tags, c.follow_status, c.next_contact_time, c.belong_user_id, c.belong_dept_id, c.is_pool, c.enter_pool_time, c.last_follow_time, c.address, c.email, c.company, c.position, c.wechat, c.qq, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, u.user_name as belong_user_name, d.dept_name as belong_dept_name from crm_customer c left join sys_user u on c.belong_user_id = u.user_id left join sys_dept d on c.belong_dept_id = d.dept_id
mapper.select: select c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.phone, c.sex, c.source, c.level, c.industry, c.tags, c.follow_status, c.next_contact_time, c.belong_user_id, c.belong_dept_id, c.is_pool, c.enter_pool_time, c.last_follow_time, c.address, c.email, c.company, c.position, c.wechat, c.qq, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, u.user_name as belong_user_name, d.dept_name as belong_dept_name, (select case when cs2.to_user_id is not null then concat('已分配至 ', u3.nick_name) when cs2.to_dept_id is not null then concat('已共享至 ', d3.dept_name) else '' end from crm_customer_share cs2 left join sys_user u3 on cs2.to_user_id = u3.user_id left join sys_dept d3 on cs2.to_dept_id = d3.dept_id where cs2.customer_id = c.customer_id and cs2.del_flag = '0' and cs2.from_user_id = #{params.currentUserId} and (cs2.expire_time is null or cs2.expire_time > now()) order by cs2.create_time desc limit 1) as share_action_desc, (select cs3.create_time from crm_customer_share cs3 where cs3.customer_id = c.customer_id and cs3.del_flag = '0' and cs3.from_user_id = #{params.currentUserId} and (cs3.expire_time is null or cs3.expire_time > now()) order by cs3.create_time desc limit 1) as share_action_time from crm_customer c left join sys_user u on c.belong_user_id = u.user_id left join sys_dept d on c.belong_dept_id = d.dept_id where c.customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert:
insert into crm_customer
customer_id, customer_name, phone, sex, source, level, industry, tags, follow_status, next_contact_time, belong_user_id, belong_dept_id, is_pool, enter_pool_time, last_follow_time, address, email, company, position, wechat, qq, create_by, remark, create_time
#{customerId}, #{customerName}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{source}, #{level}, #{industry}, #{tags}, #{followStatus}, #{nextContactTime}, #{belongUserId}, #{belongDeptId}, #{isPool}, #{enterPoolTime}, #{lastFollowTime}, #{address}, #{email}, #{company}, #{position}, #{wechat}, #{qq}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate()
mapper.update:
update crm_customer set del_flag = '2' where customer_id in
#{customerId}
update crm_customer set belong_user_id = null, belong_dept_id = null, is_pool = '1', enter_pool_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where customer_id = #{customerId}

update crm_customer set belong_user_id = #{belongUserId}, belong_dept_id = #{belongDeptId}, is_pool = '0', enter_pool_time = null, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.select:
select count(1) from crm_customer c where c.del_flag = '0'
${params.dataScope}
where c.del_flag = '0' and ( c.customer_name = #{customerName} or c.phone = #{phone} or c.email = #{email} or c.company = #{company} or 1=0 ) limit 5
mapper.update: update crm_customer set del_flag = '3', merge_to_id = #{mergeToId}, update_time = sysdate() where customer_id = #{customerId}
